motion.notes: Use once per route or major layout, not on every child.

motion.reducedMotion: render text immediately with optional 120ms fade
motion.notes: Use for short headings only. Preserve semantic text.

motion.from: native sticky panel with scroll-linked inner reveal
motion.to: content swaps or progresses while panel stays pinned
motion.reducedMotion: normal stacked sections with no pinning
motion.notes: Use CSS sticky first; GSAP ScrollTrigger only for scrubbed timelines.
Hover is progressive enhancement; tap targets must remain visible.
Bottom-right desktop, bottom mobile; do not rely on toast for critical errors.

motion.from: overlay opacity 0; content opacity 0, scale .97, y 8
motion.to: overlay opacity 1; content opacity 1, scale 1, y 0
motion.notes: Keep focus management in Radix; Motion only handles visual transition.

motion.to: Lenis scroll only on creative pages
motion.notes: Disable for dashboards, forms, data grids, dialogs, and touch-heavy workflows.

motion.to: new page content with cross-fade and optional shared element morph
motion.notes: Use native View Transitions API with Next.js experimental.viewTransition. React ViewTransition component for declarative control. view-transition-name CSS for shared elements. Progressive enhancement: graceful fallback to instant navigation.

motion.from: resting center point of trigger element
motion.to: translated offset mapping to cursor delta, capped at 35px threshold
motion.reducedMotion: no translation, standard hover state colors only
motion.notes: Stiffness: 80, damping: 15, mass: 0.8. Return to center on cursor exit.

motion.to: 3D rotated surface along X/Y axes proportional to cursor offset, capped at 12deg
motion.reducedMotion: flat card hover style without 3D rotation
motion.notes: Stiffness: 120, damping: 25. Couple with perspective wrapper and will-change: transform.

motion.reducedMotion: instant swap height: auto/0, opacity: 1/0, duration 0s
motion.notes: Framer Motion animate={{ height: isOpen ? 'auto' : 0 }}. Prevent content clipping jumps.

motion.to: slid to new selected trigger item bounding rect layout
motion.reducedMotion: instant background highlight toggle without slide animation
motion.notes: Stiffness: 220, damping: 28. Standard layoutId transition in Framer Motion.

motion.to: y: 0% active docked layout. Supports dragging down to dismiss.
motion.reducedMotion: standard mobile modal bottom-up translation on enter, instant exit
motion.notes: Stiffness: 200, damping: 25. Snap coordinates at 20%, 50%, and 90% heights. Drag constraints: top: 0, bottom: viewportHeight.
